entries.reason: Blast radius is one function (safeReaddirDirectories) with two callers, both inside canonical audit promotion; Graphify shows 2 changed / 13 related files with no runtime consumers outside merge-time promotion. All other changes are the mandatory story registration artifacts. A single reviewer can read the diff as one consistent decision.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: Backward-compatible: previously-succeeding trees (stage dirs + *-final.md only) promote identically; the change only stops rejecting state files that the shipped review authorize flow itself writes. The fail-loud ENOTDIR contract for a stage replaced by an extensionless file is preserved and re-verified by the existing regression test and the promotion replay. docs/reference/cli.md required no edits (contract surface diff is empty).
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
